title: aegilops ovata var. geniculata
intro: Aegilops ovata var. geniculata, also known as jointed goat grass or wild oat, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and helping to manage respiratory problems. Aegilops ovata var. geniculata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used as a tincture to leverage its medicinal properties.
